privileged_info_summary: Task operates on a synthetically created test patient named Priya Patel (ID: BAH000005) whose demographic data is based on public health datasets and US Census Bureau names. The task requires recording two diagnoses: Malaria (Primary/Confirmed) and Anaemia (Secondary/Confirmed). Both diagnosis names and their associated metadata values (order types: PRIMARY/SECONDARY, certainty: CONFIRMED) are valid OpenMRS/Bahmni concepts confirmed in source code and documentation. The task is designed to verify a user's ability to navigate Bahmni's Clinical app and record diagnoses with specific metadata attributes in a patient's medical record.
